name: Waimea Valley Falls
tagline: The only place on Oahu where you can legally swim beneath a waterfall — botanical garden walk to boot.
bestTime: Weekday mornings for fewest crowds; after rain for a fuller waterfall
kamaaina: Kamaaina rate ~$16/adult with valid Hawaii ID (vs $26 regular)
talkStory: Over 78 archaeological sites have been documented here including house platforms, agricultural terraces, and heiau (temples) — this valley was home to the kahuna nui (high priests) of O'ahu, making it one of the island's most spiritually significant places. The 45-foot Waihi Falls is the only waterfall on Oahu where swimming is officially permitted with provided life vests. The botanical garden preserves 5,000+ tropical species, managed by Hi'ipaka LLC, a Native Hawaiian nonprofit.
